dont_have_enough_money: You do not have enough money. (%s)
task_start_blocked: You cannot start this task right now !
task_start_blocked_by_player: You cannot start this task because another player with ID: %s is preventing it.
you_do_not_have_required_items: You do not have the required items: %s
no_available_location: There is no available location for this task at the moment
you_do_not_have_permission: You do not have permission to access this menu.
no_free_field: There is no free farming field available at the moment

lobby.you_are_not_leader: You are not the leader of this party
lobby.on_mission: This lobby is on a mission
lobby.member_doesnot_have_required_level: Member %s, does not have required level (%s) to start this task
lobby.member_doesnot_have_required_job: Member %s, does not have required job (%s) to start this task
lobby.member_is_cooldown: Member %s, is on cooldown and cannot start this task

market.order_delivered: Order placed, your products will be delivered as soon as possible
market.already_have_order: You already have an active order
market.no_items_to_sell: You have no items to sell

tasks.start_failed: Task start failed, an error occurred
tasks.party_already_in_task: Party is already in a task
tasks.not_enough_players: Not enough players in the party to start this task, at least %s players are required
tasks.too_many_players: Too many players in the party, maximum %s players are allowed
tasks.time_is_up: Time is up! The task has ended.

steps.1: Field and vehicle locations are marked on your map.
steps.2: Get on the tractor, choose the crop you want to plant and plow the field.
steps.3: Don't forget to water the seeds while planting them !
steps.4: Wait for the crops to grow and harvest them with the harvester
steps.5: Load the harvested and harvested bales onto the trailer
steps.6: Take the crops to the Drop HarvestedBale point marked on your map

freelance.spawn_vehicle_failed: Failed to spawn vehicle, please try again later
freelance.no_tool_available: No suitable tool for this point
freelance.failed_to_remove_item: Failed to remove item from inventory
freelance.wrong_trailer: Wrong trailer type for this point
freelance.no_watercan: You do not have a watering can
freelance.trailer_full: Trailer is full, you cannot load more harvested bales
freelance.harvested_bale_drop_failed: Failed to drop harvested bale, please try again
freelance.trailer_empty: Trailer is empty, you cannot drop harvested bales
freelance.crop_selection_required: Crop selection is required before planting
freelance.no_crop_selected: No crop selected, please select a crop to plant

steps.1: Field and vehicle locations are marked on your map.
steps.2: Rake the points and plant the seeds.
steps.3: Water the crops with watering can.
steps.5: Load the harvested crops to delivery vehicle.
steps.6: Deliver the crops to farmer npc.

melon_pumpkin.no_seeds_available: You don't have any seeds available. %s
melon_pumpkin.harvested_crop_loaded: Harvested crop loaded to delivery vehicle
melon_pumpkin.no_watercan: You do not have a watering can
melon_pumpkin.failed_to_remove_item: Failed to remove item from inventory
melon_pumpkin.sell_npc_interaction_error: Failed to interact with sell NPC

steps.1: Field and other locations are marked on your map.
steps.4: Load the milk to delivery vehicle.
steps.5: Deliver the milk to farmer npc.

livestock_farming.feed_failed: Failed to feed the cow, please try again.
livestock_farming.cow_no_more_milk: Cow has no more milk to give.
livestock_farming.cow_not_fed: Cow has not been fed yet. Please wait before milking.

ui.desc_invite_request: You has been invited to farming party, do you want to join?
ui.desc_delivery: Estimated time it will take for the shipment to arrive at the destination.
ui.farmer_jack: Jack the president of Farmer's Alliance
ui.multiplayer_tasks_description: Earn experience and money doing tasks with your crew every day.
ui.freelance_description: Freelance farming lets you plant, grow, and harvest various crops at your own pace. Use tractors, harvesters, and deliver your crops for rewards.
ui.livestock_farming_description: Feed your cows, collect milk, and deliver it to the farmer NPC. Manage animals for extra rewards and a different farming experience.
ui.melon_pumpkin_description: Prepare the soil, plant melon or pumpkin seeds, water them, harvest, and deliver your crops. Each step brings unique farming challenges.

personal_challenges.personal_challenges_description: Complete farming challenges to earn rewards and increase difficulty levels.
